# opnsense_unbound_general (Resource)

Manages the Unbound DNS general settings on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `active_interface` (Set of String) Interfaces the resolver listens on (empty = all).
- `cache_flush` (Boolean) Flush the DNS cache on reconfigure.
- `dns64` (Boolean) Enable DNS64 synthesis.
- `dns64_prefix` (String) DNS64 prefix (empty = well-known 64:ff9b::/96).
- `dnssec` (Boolean) Enable DNSSEC validation.
- `enable_wpad` (Boolean) Serve WPAD records for proxy auto-discovery.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable the Unbound DNS resolver.
- `local_zone_type` (String) Local zone type (transparent, always_nxdomain, always_refuse, always_transparent, deny).
- `no_aaaa_records` (Boolean) Strip AAAA records from responses.
- `no_register_link_local6` (Boolean) Do not register IPv6 link-local addresses.
- `no_register_records` (Boolean) Do not register system A/AAAA records.
- `outgoing_interface` (Set of String) Interfaces used for outgoing queries (empty = all).
- `port` (String) Port the resolver listens on.
- `register_dhcp` (Boolean) Register DHCP leases in the resolver.
- `register_dhcp_domain` (String) Domain appended to registered DHCP names.
- `register_dhcp_static` (Boolean) Register static DHCP mappings in the resolver.
- `stats` (Boolean) Collect query statistics.
- `txt_support` (Boolean) Serve TXT records for registered hosts.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
